CVE-2020-12135.title: bson before 0.8 incorrectly uses int rather than size_t for many  ...
CVE-2020-12135.description: bson before 0.8 incorrectly uses int rather than size_t for many variables, parameters, and return values. In particular, the bson_ensure_space() parameter bytesNeeded could have an integer overflow via properly constructed bson input.
